# robots.txt for thetrackerapp.io
# Strategy: open everything except auth-gated/utility routes. Explicitly
# greenlight AI crawlers because AEO (answer-engine optimization) is now
# half the SEO game — ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity citations are the new SERP.

User-agent: *
Allow: /
# Public-facing legal pages — indexable so they appear in search.
Allow: /privacy
Allow: /terms
# llms.txt is the AI-crawler entry point.
Allow: /llms.txt

# Disallow internal/utility pages
Disallow: /logout
Disallow: /authorize
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /affiliate/dashboard
Disallow: /affiliate/connect
# API surface — not content, no SEO value, costs us crawl budget.
Disallow: /api/

# Status page is transient — don't index outage snapshots.
Disallow: /status

# ─── AI / LLM crawlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# We WANT these. Explicit allow makes our stance unambiguous and
# survives any future site-wide default-deny experiments.

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Perplexity-User
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

User-agent: cohere-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: Meta-ExternalAgent
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckAssistBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Diffbot
Allow: /

# ─── Sitemap (must come last per spec for max compatibility) ──────────
Sitemap: https://thetrackerapp.io/sitemap.xml

# Exercise directory — one page per loggable workout.
Sitemap: https://thetrackerapp.io/sitemap-exercises.xml
